description_long: This rifle features a compact, futuristic design with a predominantly matte black finish and angular contours. The body is robust, with a thick upper receiver and a lower section that includes a pistol grip and a short, integrated stock. The barrel is short and mostly enclosed within the main body, with only a small portion protruding at the front. There is a visible rail system on the underside, likely for mounting accessories, and a small illuminated indicator on the side. The rifle lacks traditional iron sights or optics, suggesting it may use an integrated electronic sighting system. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and high-strength polymer, giving it a modern tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, futuristic black rifle with angular lines, a short barrel, and integrated grip and stock. It features a robust body, accessory rail, and illuminated indicator.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the angular body, short barrel, pistol grip, and illuminated indicator.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the narrow, streamlined width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main profile but without the illuminated indicator visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and grip, with the barrel barely visible.
